name: Nuoc Leo (Peanut Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ingredients: mince the pork liver and chop the peanuts.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant.
3. Add the pork and reduce heat to low. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the meat is browned.
4. Stir in tomato paste, tuong, water, and peanut butter. Bring mixture back to simmer.
5. Add sugar and stir until dissolved. Simmer for 1 minute.
6. Transfer sauce to a bowl.
7. In a separate pan, toast sesame seeds over medium heat until golden brown.
8. Mix toasted sesame seeds into the sauce.
9. Combine with chopped peanuts.
10. Garnish with thin strips of hot pepper if desired.
This recipe provides a clear and concise method for making traditional Vietnamese peanut sauce, using authentic ingredients like tuong (soybean paste) and roasted peanuts.
